title: RPG Create+
description: Fun and simple mod pack with create and origin with levels to add some extra fun.
body:
A fun mod pack with Create for the tech, Origins for some fun, and LevelZ for a challenge with the level system. I wanted a mod pack with these three elements and more of a vanilla feel to it.  Also, have the Xaero's map and minimap mod to have a simple map. Fabric Waystones for traveling to any farms and villages or anything else you want to make and set them up for. 

The main component of this modpack is a vanilla plus RPG playstyle. 

Has a fun level system

 If you would like Create and a leveling system this is a fun mod pack to play.

Thanks for trying it out. Happy Crafting!
